test-case.description: provides complete help and canonical links
test-case.name: Keldor system information commands.provides complete help and canonical links

test-case.description: keeps public implementations read-only and free of presentation commands
test-case.name: Keldor system information commands.keeps public implementations read-only and free of presentation commands

test-case.description: preserves stable operating-system property order
test-case.name: Keldor system information commands.preserves stable operating-system property order

test-case.description: normalizes Darwin as a macOS kernel fixture
test-case.name: Keldor system information commands.normalizes Darwin as a macOS kernel fixture

test-case.description: preserves native uptime types and numeric totals
test-case.name: Keldor system information commands.preserves native uptime types and numeric totals

test-case.description: allows missing DMI and serial information without failing hardware inventory
test-case.name: Keldor system information commands.allows missing DMI and serial information without failing hardware inventory

test-case.description: builds aggregate inventory from one shared snapshot
test-case.name: Keldor system information commands.builds aggregate inventory from one shared snapshot

test-case.description: returns partial inventory when optional data is missing
test-case.name: Keldor system information commands.returns partial inventory when optional data is missing

test-case.description: returns a stable failure object when target identification fails
test-case.name: Keldor system information commands.returns a stable failure object when target identification fails

test-case.description: keeps successful pipeline results when another target fails
test-case.name: Keldor system information commands.keeps successful pipeline results when another target fails

test-suite.name: Keldor system information commands.normalizes hardware fixtures and native memory types
test-suite.description: normalizes hardware fixtures and native memory types

test-case.description: normalizes hardware fixtures and native memory types
test-case.name: Keldor system information commands.normalizes hardware fixtures and native memory types("Windows",null,"PowerEdge","Dell Inc.")

test-case.description: normalizes hardware fixtures and native memory types
test-case.name: Keldor system information commands.normalizes hardware fixtures and native memory types("Windows","Hyper-V","Virtual Machine","Microsoft Corporation")

test-case.description: normalizes hardware fixtures and native memory types
test-case.name: Keldor system information commands.normalizes hardware fixtures and native memory types("Windows","VMware","VMware Virtual Platform","VMware, Inc.")

test-case.description: normalizes hardware fixtures and native memory types
test-case.name: Keldor system information commands.normalizes hardware fixtures and native memory types("Windows","Nutanix AHV","AHV","Nutanix")

test-case.description: normalizes hardware fixtures and native memory types
test-case.name: Keldor system information commands.normalizes hardware fixtures and native memory types("Linux","KVM","Standard PC (KVM)","QEMU")

test-case.description: normalizes hardware fixtures and native memory types
test-case.name: Keldor system information commands.normalizes hardware fixtures and native memory types("macOS",null,"Mac15,9","Apple Inc.")

test-case.description: normalizes hardware fixtures and native memory types
test-case.name: Keldor system information commands.normalizes hardware fixtures and native memory types("macOS","Apple Virtualization","VirtualMac2,1","Apple Inc.")

test-suite.name: Keldor system information commands.preserves Apple Silicon and Intel Mac processor fixtures
test-suite.description: preserves Apple Silicon and Intel Mac processor fixtures

test-case.description: preserves Apple Silicon and Intel Mac processor fixtures
test-case.name: Keldor system information commands.preserves Apple Silicon and Intel Mac processor fixtures("arm64","Apple M3 Max","Apple Inc.")

test-case.description: preserves Apple Silicon and Intel Mac processor fixtures
test-case.name: Keldor system information commands.preserves Apple Silicon and Intel Mac processor fixtures("x86_64","Intel(R) Core(TM) i7","Intel")

test-suite.name: Keldor system information commands.normalizes Windows, Linux, and macOS operating-system fixtures
test-suite.description: normalizes Windows, Linux, and macOS operating-system fixtures

test-case.description: normalizes Windows, Linux, and macOS operating-system fixtures
test-case.name: Keldor system information commands.normalizes Windows, Linux, and macOS operating-system fixtures("Windows",10.0.20348,"Windows Server")

test-case.description: normalizes Windows, Linux, and macOS operating-system fixtures
test-case.name: Keldor system information commands.normalizes Windows, Linux, and macOS operating-system fixtures("Linux",24.4,"Example Linux")

test-case.description: normalizes Windows, Linux, and macOS operating-system fixtures
test-case.name: Keldor system information commands.normalizes Windows, Linux, and macOS operating-system fixtures("macOS",15.5,"macOS")

test-case.description: parses quoted, unquoted, empty, escaped, duplicate, and structured ID_LIKE values as data
test-case.name: Linux os-release parser.parses quoted, unquoted, empty, escaped, duplicate, and structured ID_LIKE values as data

test-case.description: prefers the first existing os-release path and falls back to the second
test-case.name: Linux os-release parser.prefers the first existing os-release path and falls back to the second

test-case.description: does not execute malicious-looking os-release content
test-case.name: Linux os-release parser.does not execute malicious-looking os-release content

test-case.description: delegates Get-UpTime to Get-KeldorUptime and preserves historical properties
test-case.name: Legacy system information compatibility wrappers.delegates Get-UpTime to Get-KeldorUptime and preserves historical properties

test-case.description: delegates Get-SerialNumber and Get-ComputerModel to Get-KeldorHardwareInfo
test-case.name: Legacy system information compatibility wrappers.delegates Get-SerialNumber and Get-ComputerModel to Get-KeldorHardwareInfo

test-case.description: delegates Test-Online ICMP behavior to Test-ResponseTime
test-case.name: Legacy system information compatibility wrappers.delegates Test-Online ICMP behavior to Test-ResponseTime

test-case.description: contains no duplicate legacy discovery implementation
test-case.name: Legacy system information compatibility wrappers.contains no duplicate legacy discovery implementation

test-case.description: exports the primary command and alias
test-case.name: Test-KeldorSecretProvider.exports the primary command and alias

test-case.description: documents the alias in comment-based help
test-case.name: Test-KeldorSecretProvider.documents the alias in comment-based help

test-case.description: tests all providers when Name is omitted
test-case.name: Test-KeldorSecretProvider.tests all providers when Name is omitted

test-case.description: tests one provider by case-insensitive name
test-case.name: Test-KeldorSecretProvider.tests one provider by case-insensitive name

test-case.description: tests multiple providers
test-case.name: Test-KeldorSecretProvider.tests multiple providers

test-case.description: accepts provider names from the pipeline
test-case.name: Test-KeldorSecretProvider.accepts provider names from the pipeline

test-case.description: throws for unknown providers and Auto
test-case.name: Test-KeldorSecretProvider.throws for unknown providers and Auto

test-case.description: rejects Vault for providers that do not support vaults
test-case.name: Test-KeldorSecretProvider.rejects Vault for providers that do not support vaults

test-case.description: rejects Detailed and Quiet together
test-case.name: Test-KeldorSecretProvider.rejects Detailed and Quiet together

test-case.description: returns Boolean output with Quiet
test-case.name: Test-KeldorSecretProvider.returns Boolean output with Quiet

test-case.description: includes detailed child checks without sensitive values
test-case.name: Test-KeldorSecretProvider.includes detailed child checks without sensitive values

test-case.description: reports OnePassword executable missing as a failed object
test-case.name: Test-KeldorSecretProvider.reports OnePassword executable missing as a failed object

test-case.description: reports OnePassword version failure and unauthenticated state without raw output
test-case.name: Test-KeldorSecretProvider.reports OnePassword version failure and unauthenticated state without raw output

test-case.description: reports OnePassword authenticated and vault accessible
test-case.name: Test-KeldorSecretProvider.reports OnePassword authenticated and vault accessible

test-case.description: reports OnePassword vault unavailable
test-case.name: Test-KeldorSecretProvider.reports OnePassword vault unavailable

test-case.description: reports SecretManagement missing module without terminating
test-case.name: Test-KeldorSecretProvider.reports SecretManagement missing module without terminating

test-case.description: reports SecretManagement missing commands
test-case.name: Test-KeldorSecretProvider.reports SecretManagement missing commands

test-case.description: reports SecretManagement no vaults registered
test-case.name: Test-KeldorSecretProvider.reports SecretManagement no vaults registered

test-case.description: reports requested SecretManagement vault missing
test-case.name: Test-KeldorSecretProvider.reports requested SecretManagement vault missing

test-case.description: reports SecretManagement vault test success and failure without secret operations
test-case.name: Test-KeldorSecretProvider.reports SecretManagement vault test success and failure without secret operations

test-case.description: reports SecretManagement requested vault success
test-case.name: Test-KeldorSecretProvider.reports SecretManagement requested vault success

test-case.description: uses 0.1.0 as the authoritative source manifest version
test-case.name: Keldor versioning.uses 0.1.0 as the authoritative source manifest version

failure.message: This test should run but it did not. Most likely a setup in some parent block failed.

test-case.description: validates semantic versions and prerelease versions
test-case.name: Keldor versioning.validates semantic versions and prerelease versions

failure.message: This test should run but it did not. Most likely a setup in some parent block failed.

test-case.description: normal builds leave the source manifest unchanged
test-case.name: Keldor versioning.normal builds leave the source manifest unchanged

failure.message: This test should run but it did not. Most likely a setup in some parent block failed.

test-case.description: injects release versions into the packaged manifest only
test-case.name: Keldor versioning.injects release versions into the packaged manifest only

failure.message: This test should run but it did not. Most likely a setup in some parent block failed.

test-case.description: writes explicit function exports into packaged manifests
test-case.name: Keldor versioning.writes explicit function exports into packaged manifests

failure.message: This test should run but it did not. Most likely a setup in some parent block failed.
